# Taha Rawjani

> Personal website for Taha Rawjani, a computer science student at the University of Pennsylvania.

Taha has written embedded software for tethered drones at Blue Vigil; built 3D-printed buoys for real-time endangered-whale detection; built a 6502 breadboard computer; programmed neo-OS; and designed tahaScript.

## Primary links

- [Homepage](https://taharawjani.org/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/2900xt)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/taha-rawjani-08959a2a0/)
- [Writing](https://substack.com/@taharawjani)
- [Resume](https://taharawjani.org/resume.pdf)
- [Whale detection poster](https://taharawjani.org/isef_poster.pdf)
